displayNameZh: 用户不转模型，做动画就可以
summary: Yt Animation Suffice component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「用户不转模型，做动画就可以」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-animation-suffice/src/YtAnimationSuffice.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtAnimationSuffice` and `ytAnimationSufficeDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Animation Suffice Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-animation-suffice to my project. Preserve the exported YtAnimationSufficeProps API and register the YtAnimationSuffice composition with the default props.
